description_long: This is a rectangular decorative pillow with a light beige or taupe fabric cover. The front and back surfaces feature a large, intricate white embroidered design resembling a stylized leaf or floral motif, which stands out against the plain background. The pillow appears to be well-stuffed, giving it a plump and soft appearance, with slightly pointed corners and a smooth, matte finish. The embroidery is textured and raised, adding tactile interest to the otherwise smooth fabric. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on any side. The pillow is shown isolated against a white background, with no additional context or surrounding objects.
description: A rectangular beige pillow with a large white embroidered leaf or floral design, featuring a soft, plump form and smooth matte fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full embroidered white leaf or floral pattern on the beige surface.
description_view_1: Top edge view highlighting the pillow's thickness and the pointed corners, with partial embroidery visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same embroidered pattern on the beige fabric.
description_view_3: Bottom edge view, similar to the top, showing the pillow's thickness and partial embroidery along the edge.
